commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=2fe2ba0784b7d4050e4005225f6d0cd582dfedb5)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds read-only stale status derivation for Skill Workshop list/inspect when create targets already exist or update targets are missing, plus service tests for those scenarios.

PR surface: Source +68, Tests +68. Total +136 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main's scoped list/inspect paths do not recheck target skill existence, and the UI renders actions for returned `pending` proposals, so the linked waiting-state behavior is source-reproducible.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers need to choose the stale-state contract and reconcile overlap with the other open fix PR before this branch is a clean landing candidate.

target.title: fix(skills): reconcile stale workshop proposals when target skill exists or is missing
target.author: chengzhichao-xydt

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
